note: P23694=PRZN_SERMA Serralysin/PrtA S.marcescens (487aa). jb.179.4754(1997) Crossref-404; EPMC: PrtA secreted by ABC exporter (Lip/Prt apparatus). Direct T1SS.
Q03023=APRA_PSEAE AprA PAO1 PA1249. 1991 paper: alkaline protease secreted by PrtDEF/HlyBD-TolC complementation. Direct T1SS. Genome AE004091 OK.

Q1ID47=APRA_PSEE4 P.entomophila L48 PSEEN1550. PLoS Pathog 0020056 is Drosophila/Pseudomonas immune paper; shows AprA is a secreted metalloprotease & virulence factor (aprA mutant) but NOT the T1SS apparatus specifically. Secretion shown, T1SS mechanism family-level. Note: 2nd locus field PSEEN1552 != UniProt PSEEN1550. Genome CT573326 OK.
P55128=RTX11_ACTPL ApxIA. 1995 paper: apxICABD complementation restores ApxI export (ApxII synthesized-not-secreted in mutant). Direct T1SS via apxIBD transporter.
P15377=RTX2A_ACTPL ApxIIA. FEMS 1993 (Crossref-404; EPMC): ApxII/type-II haemolysin secreted from E.coli by A.pleuropneumoniae pleurotoxin secretion gene products. Direct T1SS.
P55131=RTX32_ACTPL ApxIIIA. IAI 1993 (EPMC): ApxIII secreted from E.coli by heterologous RTX transporters HlyB/HlyD. Direct T1SS.
P0DKX7=CYAA_BORPE CyaA B.pertussis Tohama I BP0760. EMBO 1988 (EPMC): cyclolysin (AC-Hly) secreted, RTX, HlyA homology. Species match (B.pertussis). Genome BX470248 OK.

Q57506=CYAA_BORBR CyaA B.bronchiseptica RB50 BB0324. But cited EMBO 1988 paper is B. PERTUSSIS, not B.bronchiseptica. Secretion shown in different (sister) species; CyaA highly conserved=indirect. Genome BX470250 OK.
Q54450=HASA_SERMA HasA hemophore S.marcescens. JB 1994 (EPMC): HasA secreted by specific ABC transporter, C-terminal signal. Direct T1SS.
P08715=HLYAP_ECOLX Hemolysin plasmid E.coli. BF00334104 (EPMC): cloned haemolysin determinant secretes 107K HlyA polypeptide. T1SS hly system. Species match.
P0C082=LKA2C_MANHA Leukotoxin M.haemolytica. JB 172.2343(1990) EPMC: LktA secreted from E.coli via HlyB/HlyD transport proteins (heteroplasmid complementation). Direct T1SS.

P55117=LKTA_BIBTR Leukotoxin B.trehalosi. Cited JB 184.266(2002) is a nucleotide-sequence/molecular-evolution study of lktCABD operon mosaic structure. No secretion assay. DOI resolves & is about lkt operon but does NOT demonstrate secretion.
Q9ETX2=LKTA_MANGL Leukotoxin M.glucosida. Same JB 184.266(2002) operon-evolution sequence paper; no secretion experiment. Protein real, secretion not demonstrated.
P16462=LTXA_AGGAC Leukotoxin A.actinomycetemcomitans. Gene 2006 (EPMC): tdeA (TolC-like) inactivation abolishes LtxA secretion. Direct T1SS (OMP component).

Q7N8R3=PRTA_PHOLL Photorhabdus laumondii TT01 plu0655. Microbiology mic.0.26171-0(2006) EPMC: PrtA is secreted RTX metalloprotease, gene locus encodes ABC transporter prtBCD. T1SS. Genome BX470251 OK. Note 2nd locus plu0659 vs UniProt plu0655.

Q07295=PRTA_DICCH Serralysin A/ProA Dickeya. Cited EMBO 1990 paper demonstrates prtDEF T1SS secreting E.chrysanthemi proteases B&C; PrtA itself not the direct subject but same operon/secretion system. Indirect (family).

Q84F70=PRTA1_PHOLU Photorhabdus luminescens PrtA1. Microbiology 2006 (EPMC) characterizes Photorhabdus PrtA as secreted RTX metalloprotease via co-encoded ABC transporter prtBCD. Same protein/paper as T1015. T1SS.

P16316=PRTB_DICCH Serralysin B/ProB Dickeya. Cited jb.179.4754(1997) demonstrates PrtC secretion via heterologous exporters; PrtB only homology context there (not directly secreted in this paper). prtBC operon secreted by prtDEF established=indirect. Proper ref would be EMBO1990.
P16317=PRTC_DICCH Serralysin C/ProC Dickeya. jb.179.4754(1997) EPMC explicitly: 'E.chrysanthemi PrtC secreted via heterologous exporters and hybrid exporters'. Direct T1SS evidence for PrtC.

P35828=SLAP_CAUVC RsaA S-layer Caulobacter CB15 CC_1007. JB 180.3062(1998) EPMC: RsaA secreted by ABC transporter (type I) apparatus, uncleaved C-terminal signal; Tn5 screen. Direct T1SS. Genome AE005673 OK.

A1YKW7=RTXA_KINKI Cytolysin RtxA K.kingae. JB.01319-06(2007): RTX toxin locus identified, disruption abolishes cytotoxicity. RtxA is bona-fide RTX (T1SS substrate family); secretion inferred via locus/system rather than direct transporter-only secretion blot=indirect.
